waitlistFounder.intro: Thanks for joining the Polso waiting list. I'm Nick, the founder, and I wanted to let you know — you're in.
waitlistFounder.building: I'm building Polso for freelancers and small teams who want to know their numbers without waiting for the monthly report. Bank sync, automatic categorization, runway in real time.
waitlistFounder.batches: I'm opening access in small batches to make sure everything works smoothly. You'll hear from me as soon as your spot is ready.
waitlistFounder.reply: In the meantime, if you have questions or want to share what you're hoping Polso solves for you — just reply. I read every message.
waitlistFounder.name: Nick
waitlistFounder.title: Founder, Polso

welcome.preview: Welcome to Polso - Let's get started
welcome.heading: You're in, {name}.
welcome.intro: Your account is ready. Here's what to do next:
welcome.step1Desc: Securely link via Open Banking. Takes 2 minutes.
welcome.step3Desc: See runway, burn rate, and cash flow in real-time.
welcome.footer: Questions? Just reply to this email.

welcomeFounder.intro: Thanks for signing up for Polso. I'm Nick, the founder, and I wanted to personally welcome you.
welcomeFounder.why: I built Polso because I was tired of not knowing my numbers until my accountant told me — weeks later. By then, the decisions were already made.
welcomeFounder.value: You shouldn't have to wait until the end of the month to understand your finances. Connect your bank, see your expenses categorized, know how long your cash will last. That's it.
welcomeFounder.reply: I read every reply to this email. If something's confusing, something's missing, or you just want to share how you're using it — hit reply. I'd love to hear from you.
welcomeFounder.name: Nick
welcomeFounder.title: Founder, Polso

trialStarted.subject: Your 14-day free trial has started
trialStarted.heading: Your trial is active, {name}.
trialStarted.intro: You now have full access to Polso for 14 days. Your trial ends on {trialEndDate}.
trialStarted.footer: We'll remind you 3 days before your trial ends.

trialEnding.subject: Your trial ends in {daysLeft} days
trialEnding.heading: {daysLeft} days left on your trial
trialEnding.intro: Hi {name}, your Polso trial ends on {trialEndDate}. After that, you'll lose access to your dashboard and analytics.
trialEnding.footer: Questions about pricing? Just reply to this email.

trialEnded.subject: Your Polso trial has ended
trialEnded.heading: Your trial has ended
trialEnded.intro: Hi {name}, your 14-day Polso trial has ended. Your data is safe, but you no longer have access to your dashboard.
trialEnded.cta: Ready to keep your financial clarity?
trialEnded.dataRetention: Your data will be kept for 30 days. After that, it will be permanently deleted.
trialEnded.footer: Changed your mind? Just reply to this email.

paymentFailed.subject: Action required: Payment failed
paymentFailed.heading: Payment failed
paymentFailed.intro: Hi {name}, we couldn't process your payment of {amount} for your Polso subscription.
paymentFailed.reason3: Card was declined by your bank
paymentFailed.updatePrompt: Please update your payment method to keep your access.
paymentFailed.footer: We'll retry the payment in 3 days. If it fails again, your account will be downgraded.

subscriptionCancelled.subject: Your Polso subscription has been cancelled
subscriptionCancelled.preview: Your Polso subscription has been cancelled
subscriptionCancelled.heading: Subscription cancelled
subscriptionCancelled.intro: Hi {name}, your Polso subscription has been cancelled. You'll continue to have access until {accessEndDate}.
subscriptionCancelled.consequence1: You won't be able to access your dashboard
subscriptionCancelled.consequence3: Your data will be kept for 30 days
subscriptionCancelled.resubscribePrompt: Changed your mind? You can resubscribe anytime.
subscriptionCancelled.footer: We'd love to hear why you're leaving. Just reply to this email.

bankConnected.subject: {bankName} connected successfully
bankConnected.heading: {bankName} connected
bankConnected.intro: Hi {name}, {bankName} is now connected to Polso. We've synced {accountCount} account(s).
bankConnected.step3: Daily syncs will keep everything up to date
bankConnected.footer: Your bank connection is read-only. We can never move money or make transactions.

bankDisconnected.subject: Action required: {bankName} disconnected
bankDisconnected.heading: {bankName} disconnected
bankDisconnected.intro: Hi {name}, your connection to {bankName} has been lost. Until reconnected, we can't sync new transactions.
bankDisconnected.reason3: The bank temporarily revoked API access
bankDisconnected.footer: This takes less than a minute. Your historical data is safe.

syncError.subject: Sync error with {bankName}
syncError.heading: Unable to sync {bankName}
syncError.intro: Hi {name}, we've been unable to sync transactions from {bankName} for the past 3 attempts.
syncError.resolution: This might resolve itself, but if it persists you may need to reconnect your bank.
syncError.footer: Need help? Reply to this email and we'll assist you.

alertLowBalance.subject: Low balance alert: {accountName}
alertLowBalance.heading: Low balance on {accountName}
alertLowBalance.intro: Hi {name}, your account has dropped below your configured threshold.

alertHighSpend.subject: High spend alert: {category}
alertHighSpend.heading: High spend in {category}
alertHighSpend.intro: Hi {name}, your spending in {category} has exceeded your configured threshold for {period}.

alertMissingRecurring.subject: Missing payment: {vendorName}
alertMissingRecurring.heading: Missing recurring payment
alertMissingRecurring.intro: Hi {name}, we expected a payment to {vendorName} but haven't seen it in the past 3 days.

alertUnusualActivity.subject: Unusual activity: {category}
alertUnusualActivity.heading: Unusual spending detected
alertUnusualActivity.intro: Hi {name}, we noticed an unusual expense in {category} that's {multiplier}x higher than your average.
alertUnusualActivity.context: This might be expected (annual payment, one-time purchase) or it could be worth reviewing.
alertUnusualActivity.footer: We alert you when spending is 2x or more above your category average.

alertRunwayCritical.subject: Runway alert: {runwayMonths} months remaining
alertRunwayCritical.heading: Runway below {threshold} months
alertRunwayCritical.intro: Hi {name}, at current burn rate you have approximately {runwayMonths} months before running out of cash.

userInvited.subject: {inviterName} invited you to {organizationName}
userInvited.heading: You've been invited
userInvited.intro: {inviterName} has invited you to join {organizationName} on Polso.
userInvited.description: Polso helps teams track expenses, monitor cash flow, and stay on top of their finances.

userAcceptedInvite.subject: {newMemberName} joined {organizationName}
userAcceptedInvite.heading: New team member
userAcceptedInvite.intro: Hi {name}, {newMemberName} ({newMemberEmail}) has accepted your invitation and joined {organizationName}.
userAcceptedInvite.accessNote: They now have access to your financial dashboard and reports.
userAcceptedInvite.footer: Adjust team member permissions in Settings → Organization.

partnerClientInvited.subject: {partnerOrgName} invited you to connect Polso
partnerClientInvited.heading: Your advisor invites you to connect Polso
partnerClientInvited.intro: {partnerName} from {partnerOrgName} has invited you to sync your bank accounts and share receipts on Polso.
partnerClientInvited.description: Polso connects your bank automatically and helps your advisor keep all documentation up to date for quarterly close.

partnerClientConnected.introJoined: Hi {partnerName}, {clientName} just accepted your invitation and is now connected to Polso.
partnerClientConnected.introFirstBank: Hi {partnerName}, {clientName} just connected their first bank account. Transactions will start syncing in minutes.

clientWeeklyDigest.subject: Weekly digest — {orgName}
clientWeeklyDigest.heading: This week's summary
clientWeeklyDigest.unmatchedReceipts: {count} receipt(s) pending matching in your inbox.
clientWeeklyDigest.footer: You receive this digest because weekly digest is enabled in Settings → Notifications.

partnerDigest.footer: You receive this digest because it's enabled in Settings → Notifications.

otpSignIn.heading: Your verification code
otpSignIn.intro: Use this code to sign in to Polso. It's only valid for 10 minutes.
otpSignIn.footer: If you didn't try to sign in, you can safely ignore this email.

otpEmailVerification.heading: Verify your email
otpEmailVerification.intro: Use this code to verify your email address on Polso.
otpEmailVerification.footer: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

otpResetPassword.heading: Reset your password
otpResetPassword.intro: Use this code to reset your password. If you didn't request this, ignore this email.
otpResetPassword.footer: If you didn't request this, change your password immediately.
